/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcustom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/commands__description.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/commands__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/commands__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/telemetry__description.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/telemetry__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/telemetry__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
